form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 4th of 16 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Damino with 54.5kg at $6.90. The race before that 3rd of 12 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 2 over 2400m, 0.9 len behind Exhit carrying 54.5kg at $6.90. Finds a suitable race and looks one of the key runners.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months won by 1.0 len at Senonnes-Pouancé March 13 over 2300m in the wet defeating Liberte Cherie carrying 55.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 10th of 14 at Le Lion-d'angers on May 6 over 2000m, slow going 12 len behind Wardama with 60kg at $6.80. Back in great shape and is well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 15 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 2400m, 1.3 len behind Dream In Normandy with 57kg at $6. The race before that scored a big 5 len win at Lyon-la-Soie March 2 over 2400m defeating Second To None carrying 54.5kg at $74. Disappointing last time but cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign failed to finish at Auteuil October 12 over 3600m. When resuming last campaign third of 12 at Lyon-Parilly June 14 over 3150m, 3 len behind Leonello with 51kg at $27. May need this outing so happy to overlook on this occasion.
